name: Dehydration
meta_description: Learn about dehydration causes, symptoms, and effective strategies for staying properly hydrated.
description: Dehydration occurs when the body loses more fluids than it takes in, leading to an imbalance in electrolytes and bodily functions.

name: Stress
meta_description: Understanding stress: causes, effects, and effective management strategies for mental and physical well-being.
description: Stress is the body's response to demands or pressures from the environment. It can be physical, emotional, or mental.

name: Sleep Deprivation
meta_description: Learn about the causes, effects, and solutions for insufficient sleep and poor sleep quality.
description: Sleep deprivation is a condition caused by not getting enough sleep or poor sleep quality over an extended period.
